business_problem: Pinterest needed to scale AI-powered visual discovery to 600 million monthly active users while keeping the platform a positive, trusted, and safe experience differentiated from competitors who optimize for viral engagement.
solution_summary: Pinterest, serving 600M monthly users, runs its AI-powered visual discovery platform entirely on AWS, processing 500+ petabytes of data and over 10M AI recommendations per second. The recommendation system trains on 600+ Amazon EC2 P4/P4de GPU instances and serves inference on 10,000+ Amazon EC2 G5 GPU instances, all orchestrated by Amazon EKS for rapid microservices deployment. Pinterest Canvas, a homegrown latent diffusion vision foundation model, generates and manipulates high-resolution product images on EC2 GPUs for advertiser creative tooling. Visual search across 2.5B+ recognized objects uses vision language models built on Amazon SageMaker, while Pinterest Assistant adds a voice-enabled conversational discovery experience powered by foundation models from Amazon Bedrock.
business_outcome: Pinterest scaled AI-powered discovery to 600 million monthly active users while delivering revenue growth and user growth, driving 70% of user discovery through AI and significantly improving search fulfillment.
metrics: 500+ petabytes of data scaled on AWS
10,000+ Amazon EC2 G5 instances for inference
2.5 billion objects recognized via visual search
230 basis point improvement in search fulfillment
architecture_clues: Recommendation system built entirely on AWS
Amazon EKS for rapid AI deployment
Pinterest Canvas: homegrown latent diffusion vision foundation model on EC2 GPU instances
Visual language models built using Amazon SageMaker
Pinterest Assistant: generative AI voice-enabled conversational experience
evidence_quotes: Built entirely on AWS, Pinterest uses Amazon EKS for rapid AI deployment across the business, 10,000+ Amazon EC2 G5 instances for inference and 600+ P4/P4de instances for training, analyzing over 18 terabytes of data daily.
Pinterest processes over 10 million AI-powered recommendations per second to support personalized discovery, advanced content moderation, and responsible features.
With the help of AWS, Pinterest scales processing, storage, and analysis of over 500 petabytes of data with ease.
17% year-over-year revenue growth ... 11% increase in monthly active users ... 230 basis point improvement in search fulfillment ... 70% of user discovery now AI-driven.

solution_components.name: Amazon EKS
solution_components.role: Orchestrates microservices-based recommendation, ranking, and safety pipelines, enabling rapid AI deployment across the entire Pinterest platform.

solution_components.name: Amazon EC2 G5 instances
solution_components.role: Run 10,000+ GPU instances for real-time recommendation and ranking inference at over 10M predictions per second.

solution_components.name: Amazon EC2 P4 instances
solution_components.role: Provide 600+ high-end GPU instances for training large multimodal recommendation and content-understanding models on 18+ TB of daily data.

solution_components.name: Amazon EC2 P4de instances
solution_components.role: Extend P4 training capacity for the most demanding vision and foundation-model workloads including Pinterest Canvas.

solution_components.name: Amazon EC2
solution_components.role: Provides the underlying compute fabric for microservices, data processing, and supporting infrastructure across 500+ petabytes of data.

solution_components.name: Amazon SageMaker
solution_components.role: Builds and serves the vision language models powering visual search across 2.5B+ recognized objects for refined in-image search and discovery.

solution_components.name: Amazon Bedrock
solution_components.role: Supplies managed foundation models that power Pinterest Assistant's voice-enabled conversational discovery experience.

data_flow: Pinterest ingests user signals, Pin metadata, and uploaded images at scale; training data (18+ TB/day) flows to EC2 P4/P4de clusters that fit multimodal recommendation and Canvas diffusion models. Trained models deploy via EKS to EC2 G5 inference fleets, which generate 10M+ recommendations per second for the feed, search, and ads. Visual search queries route to SageMaker-hosted vision language models for object recognition, while Pinterest Assistant queries call Bedrock foundation models for conversational responses.
integration_points: Pinterest mobile and web apps (600M MAU)
Content moderation and trust & safety pipelines
